title: "Can't Trust WhatsApp": Musk, Telegram Boss On Meta Accessing Private Texts Without Consent
summary_full: A class action lawsuit has been filed against WhatsApp, Meta Platforms Inc., Accenture PLC and Accenture LLP.
summary_public: A class action lawsuit has been filed against WhatsApp, Meta Platforms Inc., Accenture PLC and Accenture LLP.
